div.h2: Technical Implementation Specification: WAL & Persistence Layer

g.title: System is quiescent. No checkpointing logic is active.
Checkpoint logic is executing. Global mutation lock is held.

ul.li: IO: Read-only access to checkpoint buffers allowed.
Memory: Buffers may be deallocated or marked for reuse.
Snapshot: Point-in-time capture of dirty page list.
Persistence: Streaming DIRTY_PAGE_SET to secondary storage.
Finalization: fsync() must return before pointer swap.

ol.li: Exclusivity: Only the Checkpoint Coordinator thread can mutate state.
Atomicity: The linearization point is the 8-byte write to the Master Record.
Resilience: Any exception results in an immediate rollback to the last stable LSN.
WAL Usage: New log entries are buffered but not flushed during the final sync phase.

g.title: System is quiescent. No checkpointing logic is active.
Checkpoint logic is executing. Global mutation lock is held.
